XenotypeDef.label: Marked One
XenotypeDef.description: The Marked Virus has fully consumed its host, leaving behind a hyper-aggressive and unstoppable husk driven by pure rage and viral imperative.

XenotypeDef.label: Marked One - Spitter
XenotypeDef.description: A Marked One whose body has adapted to produce and store corrosive acid. Spitters can spew burning acid over enemies, transmitting the Marked Virus through chemical burns and dissolved tissue.

XenotypeDef.label: Marked One - Charger
XenotypeDef.description: A hulking Marked One with powerful hemogen-enhanced leg muscles that allow it to close distances with shocking speed, trampling anything in its path.
